valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 22 Feb 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 23 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: Low Faeroes 990 losing its identity by midday tomorrow. New low 996 expected just north of Viking by same time
